menuItems.name: Kadak Masala Chai
menuItems.description: Doodh, adrak, elaichi, tulsi — sab kuch ek kulhad mein. Pehli chusski mein hi dil khush ho jaata hai.

menuItems.name: Kesar Elaichi Chai
menuItems.description: Kashmiri kesar ke rang aur elaichi ki mehak ke saath bani special chai. Royalty at tapri price.

menuItems.name: Doodh Patti
menuItems.description: Pure milk mein paka ke banayi chai — bina paani ke, sirf doodh. Thick, creamy, addictive.

menuItems.name: Bun Makkhan
menuItems.description: Taza bun pe motaa makkhan aur thodi cheeni — chai ke saath yeh combo toh sona hai bhai.

menuItems.name: Tulsi Adrak Chai
menuItems.description: Baarishon ke mausam ki chaabi. Tulsi + adrak + kaali mirch. Gale ke liye, dil ke liye.

menuItems.name: Chai + Osmania Biscuit
menuItems.description: Ek cutting chai aur uske saath 4 Osmania biscuit. Hyderabadi style. Dip karo aur enjoy karo.
